id: a person who understands the system
naturalChunk: a person who understands the system
avoidSaying: a person who understand the system
a people who understands the system
realLifeExamples: I need a person who understands the system.
usageNotes: With a person who, use understands because person is singular. For people who, use understand.
productionPrompts: 用 I need a person who ... 写一句关于项目协作的英文。
